tools.name: waveguard_scan
tools.description: Find outliers and anomalies in structured data — ideal as a second step after pulling records from Google Sheets, Airtable, Supabase, Notion databases, HubSpot, Financial APIs, GitHub, NPM, or any source that returns rows of JSON. Fully stateless: send known-good rows as training and suspect rows as

tools.name: waveguard_scan_timeseries
tools.description:
Detect anomalies in time-series data — use after pulling numeric metrics from monitoring APIs, financial data sources, IoT sensors, or spreadsheet columns. Send a single numeric array and specify a window size. Early windows define 'normal', recent windows are tested for anomalies.

Typical workflow

tools.name: waveguard_health
tools.description: Check WaveGuard API health, GPU availability, version, and engine status. No authentication required. Returns status, version, and GPU info.

tools.name: waveguard_fingerprint
tools.description: Get a physics embedding of any data item (52-dim at Level 0, 62-dim at Level 1 with phase statistics). The fingerprint captures structural properties via wave-equation dynamics — useful for similarity search, clustering, baseline comparison, and drift detection. Works on JSON objects, token metrics,

tools.name: waveguard_compare
tools.description:
Compare two data items for structural similarity using physics-based fingerprints. Returns cosine similarity (0–1) and Euclidean distance. Use for duplicate detection, behavioral matching, drift analysis, or checking if two tokens/wallets/contracts are structurally similar.

Cosine similarity > 0.95

tools.name: waveguard_token_risk
tools.description:
Assess crypto token legitimacy risk. Send metrics from known-good tokens as training (price, volume, holders, liquidity, market_cap, age_days, etc.) and suspect tokens as test. Detects pump-and-dump patterns, fake metrics, and anomalous token profiles.

Example: Pull CoinGecko data for 20 establishe

tools.name: waveguard_wallet_profile
tools.description:
Profile wallet behavior against baselines. Send normal wallet transaction patterns as training (tx_count, avg_value, unique_tokens, gas_spent, active_days, etc.) and suspect wallets as test. Detects bot activity, wash trading wallets, and sybil patterns.

Example: Profile 50 organic wallets → test 1

tools.name: waveguard_volume_check
tools.description:
Detect wash trading and fake volume in OHLCV candle data. Send known-legitimate candles as training and suspect candles as test. Detects artificial volume spikes, suspiciously regular patterns, and manipulated price-volume relationships.

Example: Send 100 candles from a liquid pair as baseline, tes

tools.name: waveguard_price_manipulation
tools.description:
Detect price manipulation in time-series data. Send a price or price+volume history as a numeric array. Early windows define 'normal' trading, recent windows are tested for manipulation patterns (pump-and-dump, spoofing, layering).

Example: Send 90 days of closing prices → detect manipulated window

tools.name: waveguard_market_data
tools.description:
Fetch live crypto market data from CoinGecko and DexScreener. No external data needed — WaveGuard pulls it for you.

Use 'coin_id' for CoinGecko (e.g. 'bitcoin', 'ethereum', 'solana').
Use 'contract_address' for DexScreener (any chain).
Use 'search' to find token IDs by name/symbol.

Returns: price,

tools.name: waveguard_counterfactual
tools.description: Run baseline plus counterfactual variants and measure verdict/score sensitivity.

tools.name: waveguard_trajectory_scan
tools.description: Analyze sequence drift and regime shifts over ordered samples.

tools.name: waveguard_instability
tools.description: Estimate instability under controlled perturb-and-resolve trials.

tools.name: waveguard_phase_coherence
tools.description: Measure coherence/entropy and collapse-risk indicators for candidate data.

tools.name: waveguard_interaction_matrix
tools.description: Compute pairwise interaction matrix and cluster decomposition for entities.

tools.name: waveguard_cascade_risk
tools.description: Estimate shock propagation and resilience from adjacency-linked entities.

tools.name: waveguard_mechanism_probe
tools.description: Run targeted interventions and rank effect sizes.

tools.name: waveguard_action_surface
tools.description: Score candidate actions and extract robust action zones.

tools.name: waveguard_multi_horizon_outlook
tools.description: Compute horizon-specific anomaly outlook and consistency across windows.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "waveguard_scan" is 1218 chars, far longer than this server's median (140). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Find outliers and anomalies in structured data — ideal as a second step after pulling records from Google Sheets, Airtable, Supabase, Notion databases, HubSpot,…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "waveguard_scan_timeseries" is 781 chars, far longer than this server's median (140). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Detect anomalies in time-series data — use after pulling numeric metrics from monitoring APIs, financial data sources, IoT sensors, or spreadsheet columns. Send…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: waveguard_scan, waveguard_market_data · Private data: waveguard_scan, waveguard_fingerprint, waveguard_compare, waveguard_token_risk, waveguard_wallet_profile, waveguard_market_data · Public sink: waveguard_scan, waveguard_scan_timeseries, waveguard_token_risk, waveguard_wallet_profile, waveguard_volume_check, waveguard_price_manipulation · Destructive: waveguard_counterfactual, waveguard_mechanism_probe.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: waveguard_scan, waveguard_market_data · Private data: waveguard_scan, waveguard_fingerprint, waveguard_compare, waveguard_token_risk, waveguard_wallet_profile, waveguard_market_data · Public sink: waveguard_scan, waveguard_scan_timeseries, waveguard_token_risk, waveguard_wallet_profile, waveguard_volume_check, waveguard_price_manipulation · Destructive: waveguard_counterfactual, waveguard_mechanism_probe

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
